expressions.name: _fn_ConvertCatalog
expressions.expression:
let 
    Source = (catalog as any) => let 
    Source = catalog, 
    ConvertToTable = #table(1, {{Source}}), 
    Split = Table.SplitColumn(ConvertToTable, "Column1", Splitter.SplitTextByEachDelimiter({"_"}, QuoteStyle.Csv, true), {"Catalog"}), 
    AddEnv = Table.ReplaceValue(Split, each [Catalog], each [Catalog] & _DbxEnvironmentSuffix,Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Catalog"}), 
    ConvertToValue = List.Max(AddEnv[Catalog]) 
in 
    ConvertToValue 
in 
Source

expressions.name: _fn_GetDataFromDBX
expressions.expression:
let 
    func = (_DbxCatalog as text, _DbxDatabase as text, _DbxTable as text) => let 
        Source = Databricks.Catalogs(_DbxServer, _DbxEndpoint, []), 
        catalog_Database = Source{[Name=_fn_ConvertCatalog(_DbxCatalog),Kind="Database"]}[Data], 
        default_Schema = catalog_Database{[Name=_DbxDatabase,Kind="Schema"]}[Data], 
        Table = default_Schema{[Name=_DbxTable,Kind="Table"]}[Data] 
    in 
        Table 
in 
    func

tables.name: @Dataset Metadata
partitionExpressions:
let
 Refresh = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Table.FromList(List.DateTimes(DateTime.From(DateTimeZone.UtcNow()), 1, #duration(0, 0, 0, 0)), Splitter.SplitByNothing(), {"Last Data Refresh (UTC)"}, null, ExtraValues.Error), {{"Last Data Refresh (UTC)", type datetime}}),
#"Added Environment" = Table.AddColumn(Refresh, "Environment", each _Environment),
#"Added BuildNumber" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Environment", "Build Number", each _BuildNumber)

 in
#"Added BuildNumber"

tables.name: @Measures
partitionExpressions:
let
 Source = Table.FromRows(Json.Document(Binary.Decompress(Binary.FromText("i44FAA==", BinaryEncoding.Base64), Compression.Deflate)), let _t = ((type nullable text) meta [Serialized.Text = true]) in type table [Column1 = _t])

 in
Source

measures.name: Average Basket Size LM
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    [Average Basket Size],
    FILTER(
        ALL('Financial Month Year'),
        'Financial Month Year'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Financial Month Year'[Financial Year Month Id]) - 1
    )
)

measures.name: Average Basket Size LY
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    [Average Basket Size],
    FILTER(
        ALL('Financial Month Year'),
        'Financial Month Year'[Financial Year Month Id]
            IN
            SELECTCOLUMNS(
                VALUES('Financial Month Year'[Financial Year Month Id]),
                "LYMonth", 'Financial Month Year'[Financial Year Month Id] - 100
            )
    )
)

measures.name: Average Basket Size YOY %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
[Average Basket Size] - [Average Basket Size LY],
[Average Basket Size LY]
)

measures.name: Average Basket Size
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Retail Sales Quantity],
    [Total Orders]
)

measures.name: Has Data
measures.expression:
VAR ThisMonthSK = SELECTEDVALUE('Financial Month Year'[Dim Financial Year Month Sk])
RETURN
IF (
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS('Customer Monthly Agg'),
        'Customer Monthly Agg'[Dim Financial Year Month Sk] = ThisMonthSK
    ) > 0,
    1,
    0
)

measures.name: Is In Last 12 Months
measures.expression:
VAR AnchorMonth =
    [Selected FY Month]
VAR AnchorIndex =
    CALCULATE (
        MAX ( 'Financial Month Axis'[MonthIndex Axis] ),
        'Financial Month Axis'[Financial Year Month ID] = AnchorMonth
    )
VAR ThisIndex =
    MAX ( 'Financial Month Axis'[MonthIndex Axis] )
RETURN
IF (
    NOT ISBLANK ( AnchorIndex ) &&
    ThisIndex <= AnchorIndex &&
    ThisIndex > AnchorIndex - 12,
    1
)

measures.name: Total Customers Dynamic
measures.expression:
VAR AxisMonth =
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Financial Month Axis'[Financial Year Month ID] )
RETURN
CALCULATE (
    [Total Customers],
    TREATAS ( { AxisMonth }, 'Financial Month Year'[Financial Year Month Id] )
)

measures.name: Total Customers Fact
measures.expression: DISTINCTCOUNT('Customer Activity Monthly'[Dim Customer Account Primary Sk])

measures.name: Total Customers Forced Fact
measures.expression:
ISINSCOPE('Customer Activity Monthly'[Dim Customer Account Primary Sk]) ||
    ISINSCOPE('Customer Activity Monthly'[Is First Order]) ||
    ISINSCOPE('Customer Activity Monthly'[Is Premier Subscription]) ||
    ISFILTERED('Customer Activity Monthly'[Dim Customer Account Primary Sk]) ||
    ISFILTERED('Customer Activity Monthly'[Is First Order]) ||
    ISFILTERED('Customer Activity Monthly'[Is Premier Subscription])
